translation.welcome_tenant: Welcome back! Here's an overview of your institution today.
translation.welcome_teacher: Hello! Here's how your classes and students are doing.
translation.welcome_student: Welcome back! Check your classes and progress below.
translation.teacher_management_desc: Manage your institution's educators, their profiles, and assignments.
translation.name: Name
translation.student_management_desc: Oversee student enrollment, academic records, and personal data.
translation.settings_description: Manage your profile and account settings
translation.student_hero: Your journey to excellence starts here.
translation.auth_subtitle: A seamless experience tailored specifically for your role in the educational ecosystem.
translation.manage_activities_desc: Create and manage school-wide or private activities.
translation.activity_modal_desc: Fill in the details for the activity below.
translation.confirm_delete_activity: Are you sure you want to delete this activity?
translation.no_activities_desc: Start by creating an activity to see it here.
translation.title: Title
translation.confirm_delete_schedule: Are you sure you want to delete this schedule slot?
translation.define_recurring_time: Define a new recurring class time.
translation.login_description: Sign in to your MultiCampus account to continue
translation.role_mismatch_tenant: Did you mean to log in as a tenant?
translation.login_desc_teacher: Access your classroom and student management tools.
translation.login_desc_student: Sign in to view your courses, grades, and schedule.
translation.hero_subtitle: MultiCampus bridges the gap between institutional power, teacher precision, and student potential in one seamless flow.
translation.perspectives_subtitle: Select your role to witness the MultiCampus transformation.
translation.educators_desc: Focus on teaching. We'll handle the logistics.
translation.institutions_desc: The ultimate command center for modern education.
translation.technical_supremacy_desc: The architectural bedrock of the MultiCampus experience.
translation.total_isolation_desc: Hardcore data partitioning ensures your institution resides in its own secure, untouchable digital fortress.
translation.instant_flux_desc: Experience zero-lag interactions. Our distribution engine delivers content at the speed of thought.
translation.unified_core_desc: A design language that matches the user's role and adapts intelligently to your specific institutional needs.
translation.ready_to_evolve_desc: Join the global network of institutions redefining the academic standard.
translation.edit_teacher_desc: Update the details for this staff member.
translation.add_teacher_desc: Enter the details for the new staff member.
translation.add_teacher_started: Add a new teacher to get started
translation.edit_student_desc: Update the details for this enrolled student.
translation.add_student_desc: Enter the details for the new student.
translation.classroom_management_desc: Organize learning environments, student groups, and teacher assignments.
translation.edit_classroom_desc: Update classroom details and student enrollment.
translation.create_classroom_desc: Set up a new learning environment and assign students.
translation.confirm_delete_classroom: Are you sure you want to delete this classroom?
translation.create_new_classroom_start: Create a new classroom to get started
translation.no_date_tied_activities: No date-tied activities for this classroom.
translation.course_management_desc: Define your curriculum, manage course details, and track academic offerings.
translation.confirm_delete_course: Are you sure you want to permanently remove this course?
translation.add_course_started: Add a new course to get started
translation.edit_course_desc: Update the details for this course.
translation.add_course_desc: Enter the details for the new course.
translation.enrollment_management_desc: Handle course applications, student registrations, and class placements.

translation.add_enrollment_started: Enroll a student to get started

translation.enroll_student_desc: Link a student to a course and set their status.
translation.institution_data_desc: View and manage details about your educational institution.
translation.profile_information_desc: Update your name and email address
translation.resend_verification_email: Click here to resend the verification email.
translation.verification_link_sent_msg: A new verification link has been sent to your email address.
translation.update_password_desc: Ensure your account is using a long, random password to stay secure
translation.two_factor_instruction: With two-factor authentication enabled, you will be prompted for a secure, random pin during login, which you can retrieve from the TOTP-supported application on your phone.
translation.two_factor_disabled_instruction: When you enable two-factor authentication, you will be prompted for a secure pin during login. This pin can be retrieved from a TOTP-supported application on your phone.
translation.confirm_delete_student: Are you sure you want to delete this student?
translation.add_student_started: Add a new student to get started
translation.no_comments_provided: No comments provided by the teacher.
translation.no_grades_desc: Once your teachers post your academic performance and feedback, they will appear here.
translation.delete_account_desc: Delete your account and all of its resources
translation.delete_account_warning: Please proceed with caution, this cannot be undone.
translation.delete_account_confirmation: Are you sure you want to delete your account?
translation.delete_account_instructions: Once your account is deleted, all of its resources and data will also be permanently deleted. Please enter your password to confirm you would like to permanently delete your account.
